The '''Goliath''' was a monstrous [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] owned by the [[Yahk-Tosh]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Gar-Oth]]. The droid was remotely controlled by telepathic commands from Gar-Oth only. When newly [[Jedi Knight/Legends|knighted]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Yoshi Raph-Elan]] attempted to break up the forced wedding between Gar-Oth and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Lourdes]], Gar-Oth sent the Goliath after him, but Raph-Elan was able to disable it.
